file_insights.purpose: Comprehensive session log tracking feature development across 3 sessions
key_content: Multi-phase feature plan with 9 subtasks across 4 phases
Session 2: Dispatcher changes implemented (zellij_session and zellij_pane fields)
Session 3: Test verification - 355 tests passed (323 unit + 10 dispatcher + 17 job control + 4 merge gate + 1 serve smoke)
Clear progression tracking with next phase identified

file_insights.purpose: Formal specification of feature phases, subtasks, dependencies, and verification strategy
key_content: Dependency graph ensures backend changes (phase 1) complete before frontend (phases 2-3)
Verification commands documented for each phase
Risk assessment: medium with explicit build and manual testing strategy

patterns_discovered.pattern: Phase-based feature development with clear dependency management
patterns_discovered.evidence: Phase 1 (dispatcher) has no dependencies; phases 2-3 depend on phase 1; phase 4 depends on phases 2-3
patterns_discovered.implication: Enables parallel execution of phases 2-3 after phase 1 completion, maximizing throughput

patterns_discovered.pattern: Multi-session, incremental progress tracking with explicit handoffs
patterns_discovered.evidence: Session 1 (planner) → Session 2 (coder, subtask-1-1) → Session 3 (coder, subtask-1-2) with clear 'Next:' statements
patterns_discovered.implication: Facilitates orchestrated multi-agent development; each session has single focus and clear acceptance criteria

patterns_discovered.evidence: Dispatcher (Rust) writes metadata; Quick Look (Swift) consumes and displays metadata
patterns_discovered.implication: Reduces coupling; allows independent testing and deployment of services

patterns_discovered.pattern: Sequential vs. parallel task execution planning based on resource contention
patterns_discovered.evidence: Phases 2-3 can run in parallel (max 2), but Swift file modifications are sequential (single file: PreviewViewController.swift)
patterns_discovered.implication: Recommends 1 worker (sequential) rather than parallel to avoid merge conflicts in shared Swift file

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Log file path mismatch: spec says 'logs/stdout', code uses 'logs/stdout.log'
gotchas_discovered.impact: Phase 3 LiveLogView implementation may fail to read log file if path is incorrect
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Verify actual log file path before phase 3 implementation; adjust spec or code accordingly

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Zellij web UI availability depends on specific port (8082) and version (0.43+)
gotchas_discovered.impact: Zellij link button in phase 2 will fail if Zellij is not running or wrong version
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Document Zellij version requirement; add graceful fallback (disable button if Zellij unavailable)

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Environment variable fallback behavior not fully specified
gotchas_discovered.impact: ZELLIJ_SESSION_NAME defaults to 'pmr' if not set; this implicit behavior may cause unexpected routing
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Document this fallback prominently; consider explicit validation or warning if expected session name is not available

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Swift file (PreviewViewController.swift) is modified by multiple subtasks (2-1, 3-1, 3-2, 3-3)
gotchas_discovered.impact: Merge conflicts likely if multiple agents edit simultaneously; sequential execution required
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Enforce sequential execution (1 worker) for phases 2-3; coordinate edits via clear line number ranges

approach_outcome.phase_completion: Phase 1 (subtasks 1-1 and 1-2) COMPLETED; dispatcher changes verified to compile and pass all tests
approach_outcome.next_phase: Phase 2 (subtask-2-1): Add ZellijWebButton to Quick Look preview

recommendations.recommendation: Clarify log file path before phase 3 implementation
recommendations.rationale: Spec mentions 'logs/stdout' but actual path may be 'logs/stdout.log'; this discrepancy will cause phase 3 failure
recommendations.action: Verify actual log file path in running cards and update spec or implementation_plan.json

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration test for zellij_session and zellij_pane fields in meta.json
recommendations.rationale: Current tests verify build but not that dispatcher actually writes these fields correctly
recommendations.action: Create test in dispatcher_harness.rs that verifies meta.json contains expected zellij_session/zellij_pane values

recommendations.recommendation: Enforce sequential execution (1 worker) for phases 2 and 3
recommendations.rationale: Both phases modify PreviewViewController.swift; parallel execution will cause merge conflicts
recommendations.action: Document this constraint in build-progress.txt and dispatch orchestrator; set max_parallel_workers=1 for this spec

recommendations.recommendation: Document Zellij version requirement and add graceful degradation
recommendations.rationale: Zellij web UI requires version 0.43+; link button will fail silently if unavailable
recommendations.action: Add version check in phase 2 verification; update button to show error state if Zellij is unavailable

recommendations.recommendation: Document ZELLIJ_SESSION_NAME fallback behavior in dispatcher code comments
recommendations.rationale: Implicit fallback to 'pmr' may confuse debugging if session name is not as expected
recommendations.action: Add inline comment in dispatcher.rs explaining fallback logic and expected environment setup

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding acceptance test for end-to-end Zellij link functionality
recommendations.rationale: Phase 4 currently only builds; no test verifies that Zellij link actually opens
recommendations.action: Add manual test step in phase 4 acceptance criteria: 'Verify button opens Zellij web UI in browser'
